channel.title: LLM Timeline — Writer Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Writer.

item.title: Palmyra-Med-70B (Writer)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Medical. MMLU Medical Genetics=94.0

item.title: Palmyra-Fin-70B (Writer)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Financial. "across a variety of real-world financial use cases. It outperformed popular models like Claude 3.5 Sonnet, GPT-4o, and Mixtral-8x7b"

item.title: Palmyra X (Writer)
item.description: Parameters: 72B License: open Type: model Palmyra X V2, Palmyra X V3, Palmyra X V4. https://venturebeat.com/ai/why-writers-palmyra-llm-is-the-little-ai-model-that-could-for-enterprises/

item.title: Palmyra (Writer)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: open Type: model Only up to 5B available open-source 'trained on over 300 billion tokens of text data, and the size of the resulting model is over 20 billion parameters. ' https://writer.com/product/cowrite/
